# WanderCraft

> AI travel planner for India and the world. Day-by-day itineraries, real hotels & restaurants, honest ₹ budgets, and a chat assistant (WanderBot).

## Pages
- [Home](/): Landing page with overview and features
- [Planner](/planner): Trip planner (itineraries, budgets)
- [Destinations](/destinations): Curated destinations and guides
